params.rule: 5-sleeve concentrated stock+ETF momentum. 70% stocks (top-3/5/7 by 6mo/12mo) + 30% ETFs (top-1 by 21d/126d). Gross == 1.0; no margin; no levered ETFs.
params.stock_universe_disclosure: Survivorship-biased (current large-caps with 2010+ data; bankrupt/delisted excluded). 8.0% CAGR haircut applied to stock portion.

params.rule: Pure long-only top-3 stock momentum, weekly rebal.
8-sleeve Phoenix-inspired ensemble. IV-blend weights IS-fit. Phoenix-style overlay: target 15% vol, cap 1.0 (no margin), DD throttle -10%, vol gate 99th pct.

survivorship_bootstrap.description: Bootstrap dropout simulation with realistic delist losses
survivorship_bootstrap.method: Random N%/yr dropouts at year boundaries; apply delist loss on date of removal; run TOP-3 momentum strategy; 100 sims per cell
survivorship_bootstrap.rationale: Bootstrap @ 5%/yr S&P 500 turnover with realistic -50% delist loss shows +12.8% median bias. We apply 8% conservative haircut (between no-loss +7.3% and full-loss +12.8%).
